summary: Refactoring verification testing (iteration 32). All 7 refactoring steps verified: auth.py → auth_helpers.py extraction, Layout.js → Navigation.js/LotusLogo.js/avatarSystem.js splits, AdminPage.js → useAdminData hook, ProfilePage.js → profile/ sub-components, AdminContentTab.js → 9 content/ sub-components. Backend 29/29 PASS. Frontend all 11 features PASS.

1_login_form_works.details: Login at /auth works: data-testid=login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn all found. Login with test1@bloom.cz/test123 succeeded, navigated to /.

2_registration_tab_visible.details: Register tab found (data-testid=register-tab). Register form shows: username, email, phone, password, pronouns, location, bio, avatar, Google register button. Community password field hidden because entry_password is disabled (API returns enabled=false).

3_google_login_visible.details: data-testid=google-login-btn found on login tab. Shows Google SVG icon with 'Přihlásit se přes Google' text.

4_navigation_bar.details: main-header, logo-link, user-search-toggle, messages-link, user-menu-trigger all FOUND. Nav items: nav-home, nav-support, nav-specialists, nav-legal, nav-news, nav-nearby all FOUND. User menu dropdown shows: profile-link, admin-link (admin user), logout-btn.

5_profile_page_3_tabs.details: Profile page at /profile loads with data-testid=profile-page. All 3 tabs found: profile-tab (Profil), gallery-tab (Galerie), journey-tab (Moje cesta).

6_profile_form_fields.details: ProfileForm fields all found: profile-username-input, profile-bio-input, profile-phone-input, profile-save-btn, profile-logout-btn, upload-avatar-btn. Avatar grid has 22 items. Country toggle (CZ/World) present.

7_notification_prefs.details: notification-prefs-card visible with save-notif-prefs-btn, notif-toggle-messages, notif-toggle-services, notif-toggle-news all FOUND.

8_admin_panel_tabs.details: Admin panel at /admin loads with data-testid=admin-page. All 10 tabs found: Uživatelé, Aktuality, Odborníci, Ke schválení, Recenze, Nabídky, Obsah, Nahlášení, Nastavení, Bug reports. Stats cards: 4 (35 users, 10 news, 7 specialists, 0 banned).

9_admin_content_9_cards.details: Content tab shows 9 cards: Typy nabídek (ServiceTypesCard), Lokality (LocationsCard), Kategorie právní poradny (ArticleCatsCard), Kategorie aktualit (NewsCatsCard), Kategorie odborníků (SpecCatsCard), Správa textového obsahu (TextSettingsCard), Barvy nadpisových markerů (MarkerColorsCard), Nadpisy a popisky sekcí (SectionSettingsCard), Doporučené na homepage (FeaturedItemsCard).

10_push_notification_banner.details: Push banner not visible in Playwright test browser because push notifications (serviceWorker) not supported in automated test environment. Banner code present and correct (data-testid=push-banner, enable-push-btn, dismiss-push-btn). Logic verified: showPushBanner = isAuthenticated && supported && permission === 'default' && !pushDismissed.

11_homepage_navigation.details: Homepage loads with 'Vítej, test1admin' heading, all nav items visible, 4 section cards visible, Komunita section visible.

backend_test_coverage.TestAuthRefactored: 5/5 PASS - login token+user, wrong password 401, get me auth, get me unauth, notification prefs update
backend_test_coverage.TestAdminDataEndpoints: 8/8 PASS - users, news, specialists, pending, reviews, services, reports, bug-reports
backend_test_coverage.TestAdminContentSubComponents: 9/9 PASS - service-types, locations, article-categories, news-categories, specialist-categories, texts, marker-colors, sections, featured-items

critical_code_review_comments: auth_helpers.py is at /app/backend/auth_helpers.py (not in routes/), correctly imported by routes/auth.py as 'from auth_helpers import ...'
All backward-compatible re-exports in Layout.js working: avatarOptions, getAvatarImage, getAvatarFallback from avatarSystem.js, LotusLogo from LotusLogo.js
Navigation.js correctly extracted with all data-testid attributes preserved
useAdminData hook at 399 lines correctly fetches from /api/news and /api/specialists (not /api/admin/...) as expected
AdminContentTab.js delegates to 9 sub-components from content/ directory - all 9 confirmed rendering correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring fully verified: all 7 steps preserved functionality. Backend auth.py now at 307 lines with handle_google_session() and parse_token_expiry() in auth_helpers.py. Frontend AuthPage.js (thin wrapper), Navigation.js (extracted from Layout.js), ProfilePage.js (89 lines using profile/ sub-components), AdminPage.js (229 lines using useAdminData hook), AdminContentTab.js (9 content/ sub-components). All data-testid attributes preserved. No regressions found. Entry password is DISABLED in this environment (registered users don't need community password). Push notifications NOT supported in Playwright test environment.
